mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in 70%+ of periods with FEDFUNDS declines, or Rank IC < 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating GDP growth (GDPC1) signals strong economic demand, driving equity market optimism and positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative in 60%+ of instances where GDPC1 6mo yoy exceeds 3.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payrolls (PAYEMS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) signals a tightening labor market, boosting corporate earnings and S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in 50%+ of periods where PAYEMS > 150k and UNRATE < 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) indicates expanding supply capacity, reducing inflationary pressures and enabling equity market gains over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO 2mo mom exceeds 1.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation (CPIAUCSL > 317.685) triggers central bank rate hikes, increasing discount rates and causing S&P 500 declines over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in 60%+ of periods where CPIAUCSL exceeds 317.685.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in housing starts (HOUST) and retail sales (RSAFS) signals robust consumer demand, driving S&P 500 gains over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in 50%+ of periods where HOUST > 1289k and RSAFS > 724.6B.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate (UNRATE) reflects stronger labor market conditions, increasing consumer spending and boosting S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in 60%+ of periods with UNRATE declines.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) indicates stronger supply-side capacity, reducing inflation expectations and supporting S&P 500 gains over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO 2mo mom exceeds 1.0%.
